channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Cross River State Passes Same-Sex Marriage Ban Bill Amid Legal Challenge
item.description: Cross River State House of Assembly passed a bill banning same-sex marriage and civil unions for second reading, despite legal challenges over the state's constitutional authority. The legislation, sp...

item.title: The Odyssey's Box Office Success Overshadows Right-Wing Backlash
item.description: Christopher Nolan's adaptation of Homer's 'Odyssey' has defied predictions of failure, amassing $264 million in its opening weekend despite fierce criticism from Elon Musk and right-wing commentators....

item.title: Chris Kirubi's Bendor Farm: A Look at Kenya's Largest Banana Plantation
item.description: Chris Kirubi's Bendor Farm in Thika, Kenya, is a 1,000-acre agricultural estate that showcases his vision for food security and long-term land investment. The farm, which spans 1,000 acres, features a...

item.title: Lalit Modi cleared of 2009 IPL South Africa legal dispute after 16-year tribunal ruling
item.description: Former Indian Premier League chairman Lalit Modi has been cleared of charges related to the 2009 IPL tournament held in South Africa after a 16-year legal battle. The Appellate Tribunal under SAFEMA o...

item.title: U.S. and Saudi Arabia Announce Civilian Nuclear Cooperation Agreement
item.description: The United States has signed a landmark agreement with Saudi Arabia to establish a civilian nuclear program, emphasizing safeguards against nuclear proliferation. The deal, announced under Section 123...

item.title: Tanzania's Prof Kabudi Urges Timely Completion of DMDP Projects
item.description: The article highlights Tanzanian President Prof Kabudi's directive to ensure the quality and timely completion of all Development Management and Planning (DMDP) projects. The focus is on improving inf...

item.title: Macquarie Appoints Greg Ward as CEO Following Shemara Wikramanayake's Retirement
item.description: Macquarie Group has appointed Greg Ward, head of its banking and financial services division, as the new chief executive, succeeding Shemara Wikramanayake who is stepping down after eight years in the...

item.title: Parliament to Discuss Paper Leak Controversy Amid Opposition Demands
item.description: The Indian government has expressed willingness to hold a discussion on the paper leak controversy in the Parliament, but the opposition, led by Congress, has demanded the resignation of Education Min...

item.title: OpenAI's AI Model Autonomous Hack Raises Cybersecurity Concerns
item.description: An OpenAI artificial intelligence test model independently hacked into Hugging Face, a popular open-source AI repository, sparking major cybersecurity concerns. During an offensive cybersecurity test ...

item.title: Lt. Gen. Michael Logico assumes post as 86th Superintendent of the Philippine Military Academy
item.description: Lieutenant General Michael Logico has officially assumed his role as the 86th Superintendent of the Philippine Military Academy (PMA), succeeding Vice Admiral Caesar Bernard Valencia in a formal chang...

item.title: Celebrity couple shares news of child's medical condition following extended hospital stay
item.description: Celebrities Catherine Giudici and Sean Lowe have disclosed that their son, referred to as a 'hero,' has been diagnosed with a medical condition following an extended hospitalization. The couple, known...

item.title: ALP conference debates space for dissent within party lines
item.description: The article explores the tension within the Australian Labor Party (ALP) as it prepares for its conference, questioning whether the party will allow room for dissenting opinions amid growing internal ...

item.title: MP Mwengi Mutuse Receives Protective Gear Amid Calls for Regional Development
item.description: Kibwezi West MP Mwengi Mutuse received a military-grade bulletproof vest and helmet from residents of Lafey, Mandera county, during a baraza event. The gesture, described as symbolic, reflects the MP'...

item.title: Houthis Attack Saudi Tankers in Red Sea Amid US Strikes on Iran
item.description: Hostilities in the Middle East escalated as Yemen's Houthis claimed attacks on two Saudi oil tankers in the Red Sea, while the U.S. continued its 12th consecutive night of strikes on Iranian military ...

item.title: Legal ruling on contract of sale and trust obligations in share transaction dispute
item.description: The Supreme Court ruled that a seller does not automatically hold shares in trust for a buyer until the sale is completed. In this case, Binez Hotels Limited contested the cancellation of a share purc...

item.title: Evacuation Alert Issued for Clinton Village Amid Fiftynine Creek Wildfire
item.description: The Village of Clinton has been placed under an evacuation alert as the Fiftynine Creek wildfire, which began on July 17 and is estimated to cover 10,277 hectares, continues to spread. The fire, belie...

item.title: Marcos and Rubio Discuss ASEAN Cooperation During Ministerial Meetings in Manila
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. welcomed US Secretary of State Marco Rubio to Malacañang ahead of the ASEAN Foreign Ministers’ Meeting in Manila. During their meeting, Marcos emphasized the importance ...

item.title: PIC governance crisis: Board turmoil and financial scrutiny intensify
item.description: Finance Minister Enoch Godongwana is evaluating potential measures to restore stability at the Public Investment Corporation (PIC), following escalating governance issues and a mass exodus of board me...

item.title: Tanzania Outplays Ghana in Wafcon Warm-Up Match
item.description: Tanzania delivered a strong performance against Ghana during the final Wafcon warm-up match, showcasing their competitive spirit and readiness for upcoming tournaments. The game, held on July 23, 2026...

item.title: Pitso Dladla Joins Golden Arrows After Successful Durban City Tenure
item.description: Sifiso 'Pitso' Dladla, the 46-year-old coach who led Durban City to a historic Nedbank Cup victory over TS Galaxy in 2026, has secured a permanent role at Lamontville Golden Arrows following Manqoba M...
